data.name: Eris Dysnomia
data.detailed_description:
Choose your own path as you traverse your way through multiple stages to reach the end. Build up your combos by punching, kicking, and swapping your stance to summon your weapons.

2D Action Beat-Em-Up

Enjoy a classic 2D action beat-em-up as you take down your foes.

Rack Up the Combos!

Build up your hit combos by using various weapons and types of attacks.

Multiple Stages

Take on multiple stages to showcase your combat ability.

Variety of Enemies

Defeat the many different types of opponents that will try to stand in your way.
data.about_the_game:
Choose your own path as you traverse your way through multiple stages to reach the end. Build up your combos by punching, kicking, and swapping your stance to summon your weapons.

2D Action Beat-Em-Up

Enjoy a classic 2D action beat-em-up as you take down your foes.

Rack Up the Combos!

Build up your hit combos by using various weapons and types of attacks.

Multiple Stages

Take on multiple stages to showcase your combat ability.

Variety of Enemies

Defeat the many different types of opponents that will try to stand in your way.
data.short_description: Eris finds herself alone in a world full of monsters with a scythe and a gun as her only means of protection. Join her on her journey as she battles her way through a swarm of enemies to reach her goal!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and Above a Damage Tile, All Rights Reserved.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 100 MB available space
  • Additional Notes: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

Recommended:

  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
